narrative:
Highland Heights-01-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 809 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.1 percentage points.
